channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: On constant demand, 11th May
item.description:
Keep changing to red when no on is waiting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54-56, Collier Row Road, Collier Row, Romford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On constant demand, 11th May
item.description:
Keep changing to red without button being pressed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collier Row Road, Collier Row, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1.5m pothole, 11th May
item.description:
You said you repaired it. You haven't it's unbelievably dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opp Woolstaplers Way SE16, 11th May
item.description:
More than 1 weeks flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: If dead can this tree be removed and site noted for replanting asap, 11th May
item.description:
Site for tree removal and replacement with a new tree next season please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Avenue, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I love Banksy street sign art black & white. Only wish it was millions., 11th May
item.description:
I love Banksy street sign art black & white. Only wish it was millions.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daintry Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A man lets his dog foul the gardens to the east of Cherry Garden pier., 11th May
item.description:
A local resident allows his dog to foul the gardens in Cherry Garden. The dog mess is a health hazard not just to those who use the gardens but also to the council workers who do the gardening and who have to put up with this kind of anti-social behaviour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sofa including cushion by public bins adjacent to Corbett's Wharf, 10th May
item.description:
There is a large sofa with a cushion that has been abandoned next to the public bins at the top of West Lane. The cushion belonging to the sofa has been tucked behind the bins. This sofa has graffiti scrawled on it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on shop front, 10th May
item.description:
Scumbags graffiti 2 shops Saturday night/Sunday morning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Dockhead, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn high road to 64 Brondesbury villas both sides & Hazelmwre, 10th May
item.description:
See photos

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked cars along a small road, 10th May
item.description:
Blocking access to the bin lorry’s entering because they can’t get passed the parked cars been like it since the permits come into force on kingsway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Emilia Close, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on corner of road, 10th May
item.description:
Consistently every night a resident dumps bags of rubbish that is then tracked up and down the adjacent roads. The road tonight is disgusting. The council should clean up & identify who it is who dumps on the corner of Elderfield and Glenarm Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elderfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Again.. fly tipping outside no11/13, 10th May
item.description:
It’s constant.. now two fridges and bags dumped on the pavement outside no 11/13 Nelgarde rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Lower Terrace and Branch Hill, 10th May
item.description:
The street light on Lower Terrace close to Branch Hill is out. It's an accident black spot even with working lights so please treat as urgent. No point in taking a photo as it's pitch black. I think this has been out since last week but can't be sure as I've been away.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Lower Terrace, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every week there is new fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
I had a message to say that ref 9292961 was fixed but as you see from the photos the Rubish is still there and people at to it I have cleared some myself but new stuff arrives Could this please be cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Storm drain blocked, 10th May
item.description:
Storm drain had awful smell and is blocked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Narrow Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters dumped, 10th May
item.description:
There is a box of gas canister and more by the side - that have been dumped (again) - they are in the sun and could explode
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access driveway, 10th May
item.description:
Blocking emergency access driveway for 4 garages and double yellow Blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight 42R on Red Hill, Chislehurst, BR7 is not working, 10th May
item.description:
Streetlight 42R on Red Hill, Chislehurst, BR7 is not working. The light has been off for a few weeks now. Please can you attend to fix. Regards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking in ambulance bay, 10th May
item.description:
Car parking in ambulance bay blocking access
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cumberland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
